review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: DLF Ltd. is a great company to work for  especially for the newer luxury projects. The newer/younger management are very open to incorporating new ideas and bring about big changes in the general outlook of the company.
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2:
No relevant training programs in the last 5 years that would help employees in their development.
It is mandatory to work two Saturdays in a month now. Which was not the case when I joined the company. Not once did they bother to check if this would mean the employee has to cut back on their personal development classes or take them away from doing social service.
Some of the reimbursements are bizarre - for instance employee are reimbursed only for Vodafone and not for Airtel. Vodafone at construction sites has very poor connectivity.  Calls keep dropping. No connectivity in the basements. Quality should be employed everywhere.
